scripts.django: cd apps/django && source .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver 8080
scripts.django:migrate: cd apps/django && source .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py migrate
scripts.django:sync: cd apps/django && source .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py sync_printful_catalog
scripts.celery: cd apps/django && source .venv/bin/activate && celery -A config worker -l info
